title: Creamy Saudi Lettuce Salad
description: A refreshing, lowfat lettuce salad with a creamy umami dressing that captures the flavors of Saudi Arabia in a solodinner dish.
instructions: Wash and dry the romaine lettuce, then chop into bite‑size pieces and place in a large bowl.
In a small bowl whisk together the Greek yogurt, soy sauce, tamarind paste, honey, garlic, cumin, coriander, lemon juice, and a pinch of sea salt until well combined.
Pour the dressing over the lettuce and toss gently until all leaves are coated.
Add the chopped mint, parsley, and toasted sesame seeds, then toss again lightly.
Let the salad chill in the refrigerator for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve immediately, garnished with an extra sprinkle of sesame seeds if desired.
